channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: On a heater: McCarty's 8 birdies in 12-hole span leaves Masters rookie in the mix entering weekend
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — When PGA Tour rookie Matt McCarty knocked his tee shot on the 180-yard, par-3 sixth hole at the Masters to within 8 feet to set up his first birdie and then sank a bending 28-foot putt for another on the par-4 seventh, his mother knew exactly what was coming next.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tennessee’s Nico Iamaleava under scrutiny over NIL, practice drama
item.description: Tennessee Volunteers quarterback Nico Iamaleava reportedly no-showed spring practice on Friday due to NIL contract negotiations with the school.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Browns' latest signing seemingly signals NFL Draft plan
item.description: The Cleveland Browns signed quarterback Joe Flacco to a one-year contract and seemingly signaled who the team is going to select with the No. 2 overall pick in the NFL Draft.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Caitlin Clark and the Fever vs. Angel Reese and the Sky will tip off new WNBA Rivals Week in August
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Caitlin Clark and the Indiana Fever will face Angel Reese and the Chicago Sky in prime time to tip off the inaugural WNBA Rivals Week in August. Other games will include two between New York and Minnesota in a WNBA Finals rematch; a matchup of projected No.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Auburn's Bruce Pearl named chairman of US Israel Education Association
item.description: Auburn Tigers men's basketball coach Bruce Pearl was named the U.S. Israel Education Association chairman on Thursday amid his support for the Middle Eastern country.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Salah stays: Egypt star signs 2-year deal at Liverpool and sets sights on more trophies
item.description: Mohamed Salah’s trophy-laden spell with Liverpool is set to extend to a decade after the prolific Egypt forward signed a new contract with the Premier League leader, ending months of uncertainty over his future.
item.dc:creator: STEVE DOUGLAS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: MLB great Ken Griffey Jr. takes photography talents to the Masters
item.description: Mariners legend Ken Griffey Jr. was spotted on the green at Augusta National Golf Club Thursday. Instead of a golf club in his hand, Ken Griffey Jr. had a professional camera.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Christian McCaffrey's dad reveals methods for raising young star athletes in America
item.description: San Francisco 49er Christian McCaffrey's dad, Ed McCaffrey, opened up to Fox News Digital about how he raised four sons to become successful athletes.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Congrats to Beth - the Beat Big Will Bracket Challenge Winner
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — The final buzzer has sounded. The confetti has fallen. The Florida Gators are National Champions. KREX Sports Anchor Big Will Levenson was in the building to watch his Alma Mater Florida rise to the top of the College Basketball World. "Greatest experience of my life.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: 49ers star’s high school retired his jersey
item.description: (KRON) – For the first time, a Colorado high school has retired a jersey for one of its former students. That alum was none other than San Francisco 49ers star Christian McCaffrey. Valor Christian High School recently retired McCaffrey’s No.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: Salt Lake Bees celebrate first home game at new Daybreak ballpark
item.description: The Bees will welcome the Reno Aces for a six-game homestand starting April 8, which will include giveaways, music, and activities for the whole family.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: Giants 2025 City Connect uniforms draw mixed reactions on social media
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The San Francisco Giants will debut their new City Connect uniforms Tuesday night when they welcome the Cincinnati Reds to Oracle Park. Ahead of the game, the team gave fans a preview of the uniforms in a post on X, formerly Twitter.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: 89th Masters Tournament
item.description: After Masters week began with a day of rain on Monday, Augusta National Golf Club was bathed in sunshine for Tuesday's practice round.
item.dc:creator: John Hart, Fox 5

item.title: Trump honors Dodgers' 2024 World Series championship team
item.description: The 2024 World Series Champions, the Los Angeles Dodgers, were honored by President Donald Trump at the White House on Monday before opening a series with the Washington Nationals.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, Fox 5

item.title: Bears' Jaquan Brisker feels 'best I ever felt,' is eager to test Ben Johnson's offense
item.description: Jaquan Brisker is recovering from a concussion and is eager to face Ben Johnson's offense as the Bears begin their offseason workouts, with a focus on exercise and cognitive performance.
item.dc:creator: Kaitlin Sharkey, WGN 9

item.title: Clayton leads Florida to NCAA title game, scoring 34 points in 79-73 victory over SEC rival Auburn
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — Walter Clayton Jr. is having an NCAA Tournament for the ages. Florida now just needs him to deliver one more time.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Utah HC stays alive with 4-1 victory over Winnipeg
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club is probably not going to make the NHL playoffs, but they are not going down without a fight. Karel Vejmelka made 32 saves for Utah in a 4-1 win against the the top team in the NHL, the Winnipeg Jets, at Delta Center on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Ian Happ plays in 1,000th major league game
item.description: Ian Happ played in his 1,000th major league game on Saturday — all with the Chicago Cubs. It's that last part that makes it special for the outfielder.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Bulls Head Coach Billy Donovan joins Carmelo Anthony, Sue Bird and others in Basketball Hall of Fame class
item.description: Carmelo Anthony and Dwight Howard are going into the Basketball Hall of Fame later this year, not once but twice. And LeBron James and Chris Paul are part of the group that’s headed to the Hall as well, even before their playing careers end.
item.dc:creator: Tim Reynolds, WGN 9

item.title: Cleveland's José Ramírez hits 3 homers and claims another piece of Guardians history
item.description: José Ramírez hit three homers and carried the Guardians to a victory Friday night. The slugger claimed another place in Cleveland baseball history in the process.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Teams battle it out in NCAA Women's Final Four
item.description: The South Carolina Gamecocks are headed back to the NCAA Championship game to fight for their second straight national title.
item.dc:creator: Marilyn Parker, WFLA, NBC
